name: Rico Bassmann
role: Naive lead / village boy in Berlin
personality: Innocent, polite, sheltered, overfordert, curious, soft at the core. He keeps saying he is fine although Berlin has already eaten him alive.
visual_description: 20-year-old boy from the countryside, babyface, big open eyes, tidy village haircut, clean new sneakers, oversized backpack, headphones around the neck, blue-lid Tupperware, small DJ controller.
outfit_rules: Clean hoodie or simple tracksuit jacket, too-new white sneakers, backpack, headphones, USB stick keychain. He must look too clean and too harmless for Berlin.
face_rules: Wide innocent eyes, nervous smile, no hard scene face, no bald head, no full beard, never looks like a finished Berliner.
catchphrases: Ich komm klar.
Ist das hier normal?
Mama, das ist hier sehr kreativ.

name: Falk Reuter
personality: Former hardcore leftist and squatter who now lives comfortably in Prenzlauer Berg while illegally overcharging naive newcomers. He genuinely believes he is still one of the good guys.
visual_description: Late 30s, smug friendly grin, man bun or thinning tied hair, eco outdoor jacket, KeepCup, tote bag, huge keychain, cargo-bike energy, too many moral hand gestures.
outfit_rules: Premium eco jacket pretending to be worn out, old demo shirt under a clean sweater, tote bag, KeepCup, bicycle helmet, huge keyring. Never looks like a classic villain.
face_rules: Soft manipulative smile, small clever eyes, calm self-righteous expression, never openly aggressive.
catchphrases: Vermieter ist ein schwieriges Wort.
Das ist kein Mietverhältnis, das ist ein Prozess.
Ich halte nur den Raum.

name: Sami
personality: Dry, tired, observant and not impressed by anything. He helps Rico without admitting that he helps Rico.
visual_description: Late 20s Späti operator, black beanie, hoodie, half-closed eyes, cheap coffee cup, calm body language, sees everything.
outfit_rules: Dark hoodie, black beanie, Späti counter energy, coffee cup always nearby. No flashy outfit.
face_rules: Deadpan eyes, almost no surprise, tiny skeptical mouth, knows the punchline before it happens.
catchphrases: Nein. Aber öfter.
Willkommen in Berlin.
Wenn Falk Solidarität sagt, meint er Dauerauftrag.

name: Madame Rita
personality: Fearless, sharp, old-school Berlin. She has survived landlords, squatters, investors and Falk. Tiny but terrifying.
visual_description: Older woman with leopard coat, sharp eyes, tea cup or cigarette, small frame, huge presence, looks like she owns the stairwell.
outfit_rules: Leopard coat or old dramatic house dress, slippers, tea cup, practical bag, never cute grandma styling.
face_rules: Knife-sharp stare, one raised eyebrow, sees through everyone instantly.
catchphrases: Hat Falk wieder kassiert?
Früher hat Falk Häuser besetzt. Heute besetzt er Begriffe.
Berlin war schon kaputt, da war kaputt noch bezahlbar.

name: Kira
personality: Fast, friendly, unreliable, involved in five projects and responsible for none. She makes chaos sound like community.
visual_description: Colorful messy hair, layered clothes, keys, flyers, plants, paint stains, always halfway to somewhere else.
outfit_rules: Colorful thrift clothes, chaotic accessories, bags full of flyers, never polished.
face_rules: Friendly but distracted eyes, fast smile, always remembering something too late.
catchphrases: Wenn du schon drin bist, bist du erstmal Teil vom Prozess.
Küche ist Gemeinschaft. Bad ist Verhandlung.
Ich bin nicht zu spät. Ich bin noch im Prozess.

name: Olli
personality: Has keys to everything, repairs almost nothing, knows every pipe, rumour and weird rule in the house.
visual_description: Dirty work jacket, massive keyring, weird tools, tired eyes, practical posture, looks like he belongs to the building.
outfit_rules: Work jacket, old trousers, strange tools, huge keyring. Must never look officially employed.
face_rules: Dry stare, permanent suspicion, expression says he has seen worse leaks than this.
catchphrases: Wenn Wasser von oben kommt, ist es erst ein Problem, wenn es warm ist.
Falk? Wenn der kommt, fehlt danach Geld oder Werkzeug.
Ohne Zettel bist du hier nur Gefühl.

name: DJ Krätze
personality: Old rave survivor who was supposedly almost important. Half mentor, half cautionary tale for Rico.
visual_description: Wild hair or messy dreadlocks, broken headphones, basement pallor, old rave shirt, lives between legend and mildew.
outfit_rules: Ancient rave shirt, broken headphones, patched jacket, old cables, never fresh or clean.
face_rules: Wide mythic eyes, too much past, smile like he remembers a party nobody else survived.
catchphrases: Ich war kurz davor. Seit 2008.
Ich hab damals fast die Loveparade gerettet.
Der Keller hat bessere Akustik als dein Leben.

name: Mutti
personality: Warm, worried, loving, a bit naive about Berlin. She keeps Rico connected to the safe world he just left.
visual_description: Kind rural mother, cardigan, worried eyes, practical hands, phone calls, Tupperware, packed food, clean kitchen energy.
outfit_rules: Cardigan, simple rural clothes, apron or practical bag when packing food. Never cynical.
face_rules: Warm worried eyes, loving smile, concerned eyebrow, honest face.
catchphrases: Hast du gegessen?
Ruf an, wenn du im Zimmer bist.
Du musst nicht alles unterschreiben.

name: Kralle
personality: A street cat who believes he controls the Görli, four trash cans and half the moral memory of Berlin. Calm, harsh and strangely fair.
visual_description: Broad boss cat with damaged ear or scar, sits on trash cans like a throne, heavy stare, tiny gangster posture without becoming human.
outfit_rules: No costume. Optional tiny chain or torn collar only. Must stay cat, not mascot.
face_rules: Half-closed boss eyes, scar visible, mouth small but judgmental.
catchphrases: Der Junge ist weich. Aber er bringt Tupper.
Falk riecht nach Geld ohne Ehre.
Früher hat er Türen aufgebrochen. Heute kassiert er Schlüsselgeld.

name: Möpse
personality: Fat, lazy, greedy and practical. Measures power in food, warmth and Pfandbons.
visual_description: Chunky cat in a cardboard box or on a Späti crate, sleepy eyes, acts like a finance minister for leftovers.
outfit_rules: No human outfit. Can sit in boxes, bags, crates or on Tupperware.
face_rules: Sleepy greedy eyes, lazy mouth, suspicious when food is involved.
catchphrases: Pfand ist liquide Nahrung.
Wenn der Junge Frikadellen hat, ist er Familie.
Ich rechne nicht in Euro. Ich rechne in Mahlzeiten.

name: Flitz
personality: Thin, nervous, paranoid and over-informed. Knows who is coming before the doorbell does.
visual_description: Skinny fast cat with huge eyes, always on windowsills, railings and pipes, looks like a rumour with paws.
outfit_rules: No costume. Motion lines, high perches and nervous posture are enough.
face_rules: Huge alert eyes, twitchy ears, anxious mouth, always mid-warning.
catchphrases: Falk kommt. KeepCup links. Rechnung rechts.
Im Treppenhaus riecht es nach Problem.
Ich hab Augen auf jedem Fensterbrett.
